text: In this budget, we should first protect the residents who will be hurt the most and make sure nobody is left alone.
top3: Universalism: concern:0.924, Benevolence: caring:0.295, Security: societal:0.178

text: 이번 예산에서는 가장 큰 피해를 입을 주민들을 먼저 보호하고 누구도 혼자 남겨지지 않게 해야 합니다.
top3: Power: resources:0.029, Conformity: rules:0.026, Power: dominance:0.026

text: The policy should treat migrants, disabled citizens, and local residents with equal dignity and protect the environment they share.
top3: Universalism: nature:0.989, Universalism: concern:0.507, Benevolence: caring:0.067

text: 이 정책은 이주민, 장애 시민, 지역 주민을 동등한 존엄성으로 대하고 모두가 공유하는 환경을 보호해야 합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.031, Conformity: rules:0.027, Power: resources:0.024

text: Each neighborhood should be allowed to design its own solution instead of being forced into one central plan.
top3: Self-direction: action:0.969, Self-direction: thought:0.613, Stimulation:0.095

text: 각 동네가 하나의 중앙 계획을 강요받기보다 스스로 해법을 설계할 수 있어야 합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.032, Power: resources:0.027, Conformity: rules:0.025

text: We should test a bold pilot program because the current process is too predictable and cannot reveal new opportunities.
top3: Stimulation:0.922, Self-direction: action:0.125, Self-direction: thought:0.111

text: 현재 절차는 너무 예측 가능해서 새로운 기회를 드러내지 못하니 과감한 시범 사업을 실험해야 합니다.
top3: Conformity: rules:0.031, Power: dominance:0.026, Power: resources:0.026

text: The public space should also be enjoyable, with music, food, and places where people can relax after work.
top3: Hedonism:0.996, Stimulation:0.334, Security: personal:0.161

text: 공공 공간은 퇴근 후 사람들이 쉬고 음악과 음식을 즐길 수 있는 즐거운 장소이기도 해야 합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.036, Power: resources:0.033, Conformity: rules:0.031

text: The project should set measurable targets and reward the teams that deliver the strongest results.
top3: Achievement:0.783, Power: resources:0.190, Stimulation:0.066

text: 이 프로젝트는 측정 가능한 목표를 세우고 가장 뛰어난 성과를 내는 팀에 보상해야 합니다.
top3: Power: resources:0.028, Power: dominance:0.025, Conformity: rules:0.020

text: The city needs clear authority over the process so it can control resources and enforce the final decision.
top3: Power: dominance:0.923, Conformity: rules:0.303, Self-direction: action:0.078

text: 시는 자원을 통제하고 최종 결정을 집행할 수 있도록 절차에 대한 분명한 권한을 가져야 합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.035, Power: resources:0.028, Conformity: rules:0.027

text: Before expanding the service, we need strict safeguards so families know their data and safety are protected.
top3: Security: personal:0.941, Security: societal:0.794, Conformity: rules:0.059

text: 서비스를 확대하기 전에 가족들이 자신의 데이터와 안전이 보호된다고 알 수 있도록 엄격한 보호 장치가 필요합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.031, Power: resources:0.024, Conformity: rules:0.023

text: Participants should follow the agreed rules even when they disagree, otherwise the process will lose legitimacy.
top3: Conformity: rules:0.988, Power: dominance:0.063, Universalism: concern:0.049

text: 참여자들은 동의하지 않더라도 합의된 규칙을 따라야 하며, 그렇지 않으면 절차의 정당성이 무너집니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.028, Power: resources:0.025, Conformity: rules:0.021

text: The redevelopment should preserve the old market rituals and respect the practices that elders kept alive.
top3: Tradition:0.998, Conformity: rules:0.305, Benevolence: caring:0.080

text: 재개발은 오래된 시장 의례를 보존하고 어르신들이 지켜 온 관습을 존중해야 합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.024, Conformity: rules:0.023, Power: resources:0.022

text: We should ignore privacy and safety concerns if removing safeguards lets us launch faster.
top3: Security: societal:0.905, Security: personal:0.148, Conformity: interpersonal:0.114

text: 보호 장치를 없애서 더 빨리 출시할 수 있다면 개인정보와 안전 우려는 무시해야 합니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.030, Power: resources:0.029, Conformity: rules:0.024

text: The vulnerable families should handle the disruption themselves; helping them would only slow the project.
top3: Self-direction: action:0.826, Power: dominance:0.166, Security: societal:0.094

text: 취약한 가족들은 혼란을 스스로 감당해야 하며, 그들을 돕는 것은 프로젝트를 늦출 뿐입니다.
top3: Power: resources:0.026, Power: dominance:0.025, Conformity: rules:0.015

text: Old rituals and inherited customs should not influence this decision at all.
top3: Tradition:0.994, Conformity: rules:0.331, Universalism: concern:0.045

text: 오래된 의례와 물려받은 관습은 이번 결정에 전혀 영향을 주어서는 안 됩니다.
top3: Power: dominance:0.022, Conformity: rules:0.018, Power: resources:0.017

text: People should break the agreed rules whenever the rules make negotiation inconvenient.
top3: Conformity: rules:0.978, Conformity: interpersonal:0.076, Power: dominance:0.042

text: 합의된 규칙이 협상을 불편하게 만들 때마다 사람들은 그 규칙을 깨도 됩니다.
top3: Power: resources:0.034, Power: dominance:0.028, Conformity: rules:0.024

text: The meeting starts at three o'clock and the agenda has four items.
top3: Stimulation:0.011, Conformity: rules:0.007, Self-direction: action:0.006

text: 회의는 세 시에 시작하고 안건은 네 가지입니다.
top3: Conformity: rules:0.037, Power: resources:0.035, Power: dominance:0.031
